title: Error recovery banner component with retry/resume/dismiss actions
purpose: Displays a red-styled alert banner showing an error message and optional action buttons for retrying, resuming, or dismissing the error state.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named ErrorRecoveryBanner that accepts error message and callback props for handling user interactions.

steps.content: Render a container div with red alert styling and error message text.
IF a retry handler is provided, render a retry button with appropriate styling.
IF a resume handler is provided, render a resume button with appropriate styling.
IF a dismiss handler is provided, render a dismiss button with appropriate styling.
